EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} increased the size of disk "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} is increasing the size of disk "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The size of disk "{object.name}" is reduced on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to increase the size of disk "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
Failed to reduce the size of disk "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
